PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?duration WHERE {
  VALUES ?year {
    1977 1978 2008 2009
  }
  ?series wdt:P31 wd:Q1363275 ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  BIND(YEAR(?date) AS ?series_year)
  FILTER(?series_year = ?year)
  ?game wdt:P3875 ?series ; wdt:P2041 ?duration ; wdt:P541 wd:Q54274 ; wdt:P541 wd:Q183302 .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?duration)
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 15
